title: Amazon Linux 2023 - ALAS2023-2026-1854: Medium priority package update for python-click
description:
Package updates are available for Amazon Linux 2023 that fix the following vulnerabilities:
CVE-2026-7246:
	Pallets Click, versions 8.3.2 and below, contain a command injection vulnerability in the click.edit() function, allowing attackers to pass arbitrary OS commands from an unprivileged account.
